title: Bows to Guns! 3D
description: This texture pack changes the Bow and Crossbow's texture to a Glock and a Shotgun model
body:
Want to see Guns and Shotguns in minecraft but dont want to add mods? well, i've got just the solution for you.

This texturepack changes the Bow's texture to a Glock model. and the Crossbow's texture to a Shotgun Model

**This Texturepack does not change the arrows texture nor does it add bullets, this Texturepack only changes the Bow's and Crossbow's texture, they still work like normal Bow and Crossbow.
**
﻿MADE WITH BLOCKBENCH

Theres really not much else to discuss
